caption:
Some pieces carry a weight that has nothing to do with the metal they're made from.

We are welcoming a new name into the Blink family — @daniel_burj, a jewellery brand that speaks in textures, contrasts and quiet intention. Hammered silver, raw edges, a flash of gold where you least expect it. These are not decorations, they are statements worn close to the skin. Swipe through and let each piece tell you something different.

Bracelets: @daniel_burj
Pendant necklace: @daniel_burj
Tag necklaces: @daniel_burj
